sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88552" key="prosana/klima" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανά-κλῐμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n88552.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that on which one leans,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.407</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diosc.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
